title: End-to-end proof of life verification

evidence_items.description: Routing decision pipeline verified: Kafka topics exist with events, DB projection wired
Cost measurement pipeline verified: API endpoints return real data (zero valid when no sessions)
Dashboard verified: no hardcoded fallback values, quality scores null when no data

summary: SOW Phase 2 end-to-end proof of life completed. Routing, cost, and dashboard pipelines verified against real infrastructure on .201. No mock data present.
